name: Re-Confirmation
body:

name: DemoGuide
body:
Your demo session is scheduled on *{{1}}.*

Before the session, kindly review the attached Parent Onboarding Guide.
*_This guide contains important information regarding:_*

*• Demo process*
*• Admission fee*
*• Tutor support*
*• Service policies*

Reviewing this guide is a *mandatory part* of our demo process and helps ensure complete transparency before the session.

name: Tutor Agreement
body:
Thank you for showing interest in a Saraswati Tutorials assignment.  

To maintain verified and professional tutor allocation, all demo/class requests are processed through our *One-Time Tutor Authorisation System.*

✅ After authorisation, you will receive:  
• Parent contact details;
• Exact Parent’s location
(Society,Wing&Flat No.);
• Demo timings updates  
 For present & future interested opportunities from Us.

_____

_Our verification team will review and proceed accordingly._

name: High
body:
Hello *Mr./Ms.{{1}}*,

Please review and authorise the attached *Tutoring Service Agreement* to proceed further.

This agreement includes *important details* regarding *the Service Fee & Demo Process, Penalty and Our Promises.*

Once completed, we will immediately begin working on your inquiry and schedule the demo *{{2}}*

As this is *mandatory,* we’re not allowed to proceed further with demo scheduling without authorisation.

— *Saraswati Tutorials*

name: Agreement Signed Confirmation
body:
Thank you,*Mr./Ms.{{1}}*

✅ We have received the signed agreement.

Our team is now shortlisting suitable tutors based on your requirement.
You will receive tutor demo details shortly.

We appreciate your trust in Saraswati Tutorials.

name: Structured Demo Scheduled
body:
Hello *Mr/Ms.{{1}}* 😊  

Great news! Your tutor has been assigned and your demo session is scheduled.  

•Tutor Name: *{{2}}*
•Demo Timing: *{{3}}* 

📌 Quick Note:  
This demo session is for evaluation purposes. If you are satisfied with the tutor, the admission & Onboarding needs to be completed Within 24hrs to block the tutor’s slot.  

Please note: A tutor can take only two tuitions per day, and _*the assigned tutor already has one tuition.*_ So confirming early will help secure your slot.

name: Structured Demo Scheduled
body:
Hello *Mr/Ms.{{1}}* 😊  

Great news! Your tutor has been assigned and your demo session is scheduled.  

•Tutor Name: *{{2}}*
•Demo Timing: *{{3}}* 

📌 Quick Note:  
This demo session is for evaluation purposes. If you are satisfied with the tutor, the admission fee needs to be completed immediately to block the tutor’s slot.  

Please note: A tutor can take only two tuitions per day, and _*the assigned tutor already has one tuition.*_ So confirming early will help secure your slot.  

We Only proceed with parents who are ready to enroll after a successful demo 👍  

After the demo, *you will receive a feedback message.* Kindly confirm your response promptly using the buttons provided

name: Feedback
body:
Hello Mr./Ms.{{1}},

_Thanks for Attending the Demo Session._

*Now,You can share your feedback on today’s demo session!*

It’ll Guide us to plan the next steps and secure the tutor’s slots accordingly.

name: Normal Demo Scheduled
body:
Hello Mr./Ms.{{1}},

Your demo has been scheduled
for  *{{6}}*.

👤 Assigned Tutor : *{{2}}*
 Grade: *{{5}}*

Please ensure the student is available during the demo time.

After the demo, you’ll receive a quick confirmation message to proceed further.

name: 2Fees Delayed Confirmation
body:
Hello  *Mr./Ms.{{1}},*

This is an update regarding the tutor slot reserved following the recent demo.

*As per the allocation process, admission confirmation is required within {{2}} of the demo to reserve the assigned tutor and preferred time slot.*

_After this period, we may not be able to guarantee the same tutor or time slot, as the reservation may be released to other pending demo requests._

name: Fees Delayed Confirmation
body:
Hi *Mr/Ms. {{1}}!*
Just a quick reminder that parent is supposed to confirm the onboarding within 24 hours of the demo.

After that, we can’t guarantee the same tutor and time slot availability. 
If you have any queries, please feel free to reach out—happy to help!

name: 24hrs Confirmation
body:
Hi *Mr/Ms. {{1}}!*
Just a quick reminder that parent is supposed to confirm the onboarding within 24 hours of the demo.

After that, we can’t guarantee the same tutor and time slot availability. 
If you have any queries, please feel free to reach out—happy to help!

name: Anti-Bypass Gentle Reminder
body:
Dear *Mr./Ms. {{1}}*,  

This is to inform you that all payments must be made *only to Saraswati Tutorials.*  

❗ *Direct/In-Middle payment to tutors is strictly not allowed.*

Any such action will be treated as a *violation of agreement,* and services may be *discontinued immediately.* 

Thank you for your cooperation.

name: POS Receipt
body:
Dear {{1}},

Here’s your electronic receipt for your order *{{2}}* from *{{3}}*

Thank you for shopping with us.

name: Point of Sale: Marketing
Payment Success Confirmation (Auto)
body:
Payment Successful ✅

Hello  {{1}},
We have received your admission fee payment of  {{2}}.

Your tutor slot is now confirmed.
The tutor will start regular classes as scheduled.

For any assistance, feel free to reach out to us anytime.

Welcome to Saraswati Tutorials.

name: Payment Trigger
body:
Great choice,  {{1}}! 🎉

To confirm and book this tutor slot, please complete the admission fee payment.

*Tuition Fee: ₹{{2}}*
*Admission Fee: ₹{{3}}*
Admission fee covers:
• Tutor slot confirmation
• Home assignment service
• Backup teacher support
• Ongoing assistance & monitoring

👉 Pay Now:  {{4}}

Once payment is completed, confirmation will be sent instantly.
